title: PlayerThingsPaperBin
description: A resource pack, where to change the texture you rename the item, crafted by the PaperBin server community and compiled together by gorkareplay.
body:
This is a resource pack with textures and item names, which were suggested by players of the PaperBin server, to see the full list of textures and how to rename the items to make them visible download the source code from my [**github**](https://github.com/gorkareplay/PlayerThingsPaperBin/)

**Note:** You need a CIT mod to make this resource pack work
